Listen. What is the speaker's main argument?
text: The Sapir-Whorf hypothesis — that language shapes thought — has been debated for decades. The strong version, linguistic determinism, has been discredited. But the weaker version, linguistic relativity, continues to garner support. Language can influence thought, even if it doesn't determine it.
options: Language has no effect on thought
Language can influence but not determine thought
answer: Language can influence but not determine thought
